rationale: Faithful v12 Task 2 implementation within frozen scope. Private-Set read-only facades for NODE_KINDS/EDGE_KINDS/ASSERTION_STATUS (mutators throw; forEach third arg is the facade, not the private Set). canonicalJson, per-kind locator schemas with D13 content bindings (blob_sha/text_sha256/entry_hash/summary_sha256; commit exception without repository_ref), validateSourceRef forms, status/assertor coupling (WEAVER_IDS private; nonempty model:<seat>), endpoint matrix including all four depends-on rows and exact discharges matrix, supersedes same-kind + human/model assertor, and explicit edgeInput shape (from_node/to_node 64-hex + from_locator/to_locator {kind,locator}) with mismatch REJECTED against deriveNodeId — all present and tested. Exact outer schemas on deriveNodeId/docAddressKey. deriveRepositoryRef uses exact commands, accepts only exact git-output forms (terminal-newline strip only; trailing space/malformed ≠ shallow), throws stable ShallowRepositoryError (not exported) on true. Injected units cover true/malformed/multi-root/malformed-root; real-git D18 fixture builds multi-commit origin via PRIVATE fixture-only no-shell allowlist (not Task 4a weaver wrapper), proves --depth 1 shallow reject and full clone git-root:<origin root>, cleans up in finally. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node: stdlib only, no spine change, no scope expansion. Gate finalStatus meets. Accept AS-IS.
